project_pages.description:
A curated set of projects that best represent my strengths across AI, full-stack development, and practical product building. This section is meant to be a quick snapshot of work I consider most complete, useful, or technically meaningful.

You'll find projects like the YouTube Analytics Dashboard, Translator Helper, Bird Laser Targeter on the Edge, and selected game/software projects such as Electronica. Together they show a mix of production-style engineering, applied AI workflows, and end-to-end ownership.

A collection of projects I built outside school to solve personal problems, explore ideas, or practice specific technologies in depth. The work here spans productivity tools, AI-assisted workflows, and experimental app concepts.

Examples include Spending Dashboard for personal finance tracking, Translator Helper for transcription and translation workflows, YouTube Analytics Dashboard for channel insights, and smaller experiments like Diamond City Radio and fan-translation subtitle work.

Projects completed during my coursework at Singapore Institute of Technology, with a strong focus on applied AI and system integration. This section reflects module work where I had to balance technical implementation with practical constraints and team collaboration.

Highlighted work includes Anime Image Upscaler (ESRGAN fine-tuning), Bird Laser Targeter on the Edge (embedded AI plus hardware control), and Japanese Learning Card Game (Unity-based educational game prototype).

Projects from my time at Nanyang Polytechnic, covering core game-development fundamentals across C++ and Unity (C#). These projects emphasize gameplay systems, AI behavior, physics, UI flows, and team-based development.

You'll see work like Electronica, The Last Survivor, L.O.C.U.S, Iron Age, and several C++ coursework games. They show my foundation in game programming, from low-level systems to complete playable builds.

Every visible project in one place across featured, personal, and school categories. Use this section when you want the full picture of my work without filtering by source.

It combines AI tools, data and productivity apps, embedded systems projects, and game-development work. Representative entries include YouTube Analytics Dashboard, Translator Helper, Bird Laser Targeter on the Edge, Electronica, and many others.
